title: Pogačar Climbing Simulation
description: 10-20 min sustained efforts simulating Tour de France cols
researcher: Iñigo San Millán / UAE Team Emirates

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/4. 70% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First block at 100%. This is race pace. If you can't hold this, you can't race. Simple.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Starting sweet spot work. 100% just below FTP. You should maintain this for 20+ minutes.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Starting threshold work. This is the bread and butter of cycling fitness. Embrace it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First block. Sweet spot: called 'sweet' by people who've clearly never done it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting: 100% for 15:00. Settle in. You can hold this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/4. 55% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 10:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 34% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 47% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 28 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 35 minutes in. 105% at 82-90 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 47% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 2 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 47% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 47% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 105%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 61% done. 0 intervals left. 20 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 25min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 45 minutes of work done. 20 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 45 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 20 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Deep into it now. 53 minutes of work behind you. Finish what you started.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 3: 112% FTP. You're 53 minutes in. Power should feel hard but repeatable. Adjust if fading.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Deep into it: 72% done. This is where you separate from your past self. Dig deeper.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Deep into it. Your lungs will remember this moment. So will your neighbors from the screaming.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Deep work. 112% for 5:00. Then 5:00 rest. Suffer productively.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 58 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 78% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 78% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 78% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 200% for 30s. Then 10min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 200% × 30s. Then 10min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 30s at 200%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 200% for 30s. Then 10min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 200% × 30s. Alternating, 95-105 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 86% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 86% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 86% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 86% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 86% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.
